exceptions.justification: Generated constants and effect-adapter scaffolding intentionally carry dead_code allowance for contract synchronization and compile hygiene.
exceptions.removal_plan: Remove exception after planned contract cleanups and delete tagged usage in code.

exceptions.justification: One clippy layout allowance keeps the test module adjacent to the code it exercises until the module boundary is simplified.
exceptions.removal_plan: Remove the allowance when the module boundary is simplified and the test module can move without breaking reviewability.

exceptions.justification: The retired-terms scanner still needs a bounded self-reference so the allowlist can describe the exact literal tokens it governs.
exceptions.removal_plan: Drop once the scanner can classify retired terms without reading literal token examples from its own allowlist.

exceptions.justification: One bounded self-usage exception is retained so the scanner can keep enforcing the retired-terms rewrite map against literal tokens.
exceptions.removal_plan: Drop once the rewrite map is enforced without any literal token self-reference in the allowlist.
